name: nickdekruijk/leap-template
description: Frontend website template scaffolding for nickdekruijk/leap: the leap:template and leap:content commands. Install with composer require --dev.

suggest.nickdekruijk/minify: ^4.0 for SCSS/JS compilation and bundling used by the frontend template (php artisan leap:template)
suggest.nickdekruijk/settings: Admin-editable settings and footer used by the frontend template (php artisan leap:template)
suggest.nickdekruijk/imageresize: Responsive asset_resized() images used by the frontend template
suggest.nickdekruijk/vanilla-slider: Carousel/slider used by the frontend template
suggest.nickdekruijk/horizontal-scroller: Horizontal-scroll sections used by the frontend template
